title: BugBountyApp
description: Bug bounty platform for web applications. Prepare and submit vulnerability reports with educational support for programs like YesWeHack and HackerOne.
tagline: Report vulnerabilities with structure and guidance.

home.heroLead: Bug bounty platform for web applications.
home.heroHint: Prepare to integrate real bug bounty programs (YesWeHack, HackerOne, etc.) with our educational support.
home.demoNotice: This is a demonstration site. Please do not enter personal data — use fictional information instead, as the site is still under construction.
